ingest_attempt.last_known_failure_cause: Gemini 429 — free-tier daily quota exhausted. Paid billing was set up ($10 / M8 Agent project) but retries still showed FreeTier in Vercel logs, suggesting GEMINI_API_KEY in Vercel belongs to a DIFFERENT project than the billed one.
live_test_procedure: 1. Muhammad deploys preview from branch feat/rag-content
3. Say: 'ingest this as a book: title=Test Book, source_class=established'
4. If Gemini quota OK: M8 replies with chapter count + nodes extracted; verify at GET /api/knowledge?fn=inventory
5. If Gemini quota hit: M8 now replies with NotebookLM handoff message (not silent 0 nodes)

lib/knowledge-intake.js: buildNotebookLMHandoff({ source_id, title, source_class }) — formats actionable handoff message with 3 options (wait/NotebookLM/fix key)
extractConceptsWithStatus(source_id) — like extractConcepts but returns { candidates, quota_exhausted }; breaks on first quota hit instead of silently skipping all chunks
buildKnowledgeIngestContext() — now uses extractConceptsWithStatus; returns NotebookLM handoff text (not 0-node dead-end) when quota is exhausted
ingestBookText() — per-chapter extraction now uses extractConceptsWithStatus; breaks the chapter loop on quota hit + sets timedOut=true + adds quota_exhausted + notebooklm_handoff to return value
getInventoryStatus() — wraps getIngestionInventory with plain-English summary, status field, how_to_ingest steps, notebooklm_tip, and test_docx_ready reminder
api/knowledge.js: New case 'status': -> GET /api/knowledge?fn=status returns polished status + NotebookLM tip

existing_callers_unchanged.note: extractConcepts() (old function) is UNCHANGED — ingest-full.js and ingest-extract-existing.js still call it and keep working. The new extractConceptsWithStatus() is an additive parallel path used only by the chat functions.

notebooklm_recommendation.for: bn01.pdf through bn20.pdf (البداية والنهاية, 20 Arabic scanned PDFs)
notebooklm_recommendation.why: Gemini OCR + extraction on 20 Arabic PDFs will drain the free quota repeatedly. NotebookLM handles OCR + retrieval + citations for free at notebooklm.google.com.
notebooklm_recommendation.m8_role: Use M8 for research notes, fleet data, text snippets, Collatz corpus. Use NotebookLM for heavy scanned books. They complement each other.
notebooklm_recommendation.no_embed_api: NotebookLM has no public embed API (as of 2026) — use it standalone, not embedded in M8.

key_fix_for_gemini_paid_tier.symptom: Retries after billing setup still show FreeTier in Vercel runtime logs
key_fix_for_gemini_paid_tier.root_cause: GEMINI_API_KEY in Vercel env likely belongs to the DEFAULT project (free tier), not the 'M8 Agent' project where $10 was deposited
key_fix_for_gemini_paid_tier.fix: AI Studio → project selector (top-left) → M8 Agent → API Keys → generate new key → paste into Vercel GEMINI_API_KEY env var (and redeploy)
